name: Salomé
lastAssessment: First CFO run (Mar 15, 22:04). Reviewed pricing page ($19/$49), MONETIZATION.md, PRICING-REVIEW.md. Key findings: (1) Pricing mismatch #37 critical — Stripe has $9.99/$29.99, page shows $19/$49. Left revenue impact comment estimating $108K/yr loss at scale. (2) No annual pricing exists — created issue #48 [REVENUE] to add annual toggle with 20% discount. (3) No revenue label on repo — created it. (4) Free tier has 100 API calls/day limit but no enforcement (#42). Priority: Fix #37 → Launch #48 (annual) → Ship #42 (metering).
